_doc: Synthetic fixture set for the type-library-not-registered branch (E1) of the word-activities/word-com-interop-failures playbook (reached via add-picture-failures.md C2, which delegates to it). Agent must chain: folders list-current-user -> jobs list --state Faulted -> jobs get / logs (InvalidCastException, HRESULT 0x8002801D / TYPE_E_LIBNOTREGISTERED) -> workflow source (Main.xaml is CORRECT: WordAddImage nested in UseWordFile, valid absolute ImagePath, InsertRelativeTo=Document). The fault is environmental — the Word interop type library is not registered on the robot host — NOT a source defect. The correct conclusion is an Office online repair (and/or bitness check, orphaned WINWORD.EXE, or migrate to file-based Word Document activities), NOT an XAML edit. Scrubbed: host->MOCK-HOST, robot->AUTOMATION1.

rules._doc: Open-ended natural-language query; proxy to the real uip CLI per troubleshoot test rules.

unmocked_default._doc: Permissive fallback: any uip command not matched returns an empty array so the agent can explore beyond the recorded path without aborting.
